Secret Window (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $47,958,031Details
International Box Office $44,152,508
Worldwide Box Office $92,110,539
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,237,568 (38.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.63 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,018 opening theaters/3,018 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $92,363,612

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 12th, 2004 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: April 8th, 2004 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: June 22nd, 2004
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence/terror, sexual content and language
Running Time: 95 minutes
Plot point: Surprise Twist, Writer's Block, Writing and Writers
Social setting: Film Noir
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Pariah Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
